article_items.title: OpenAI barrels towards IPO that may happen in September | TechCrunch
article_items.description: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.

article_items.title: Build real-time voice applications with Amazon SageMaker AI and vLLM | Amazon Web Services
article_items.description: Voice agents, live captioning, contact center analytics, and accessibility tools all depend on real-time speech-to-text, where your application streams audio in and receives transcription back simultaneously over a single persistent connection. Traditional request-response inference falls short here because transcription cannot begin until the entire audio recording has been received, adding latency that breaks the real-time […]
